pages.reasonForQuarantine: Lowercase HTML elements with server IDs still require explicit server-element shims.
pages.suggestedMigrationApproach: Port the remaining server-control or lifecycle logic into BWFC-compatible components, services, or semantic patterns before re-enabling the page.
